name: What damages can I get for permanent neck damage from work in Boise Idaho?
description: PPD per impairment, medical, future care.[2][6]

mainEntity.name: What damages can I get for permanent neck damage from work in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: PPD per impairment, medical, future care.[2][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Permanent partial disability (PPD) based on impairment rating, plus medical.[2] Key factors: (1) AMA guides rating; (2) Scheduled for neck; (3) Future care. Settlements average $740k.[6] Rated after max medical improvement.
